MOTION - Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate And Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-11-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance by any party or counsel.

PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S MOTION TO VACATE AND SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT.

There being no appearances, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff's Discover Bank's Motion to vacate default and default judgment is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Order signed. (see signed order for details)

Judge: Anne-Cristine Massullo, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/ACM)
